# Personal Website - Siddhartha Srinivasa

Clean, maintainable academic website built with [Jekyll](https://jekyllrb.com/) and [labdata](https://github.com/siddhss5/labdata).

**Live site:** https://goodrobot.ai

## Architecture Philosophy

**Single source of truth** for all data. **Auto-generated** output. **No duplication.**

```
├── lab.yaml                    # Profile, links, site config (EDIT THIS)
├── data/
│   ├── people.yaml            # Lab members (EDIT THIS)
│   ├── projects.yaml          # Projects (EDIT THIS)
│   └── pubs/                  # BibTeX files (EDIT THIS - submodule)
├── site/                      # Jekyll site
│   ├── _config.yml            # ← Auto-generated from lab.yaml
│   ├── _data/
│   │   ├── lab.yml            # ← Auto-generated by labdata
│   │   ├── videos.yml         # ← Auto-updated weekly from YouTube
│   │   ├── awards.yml         # Static YAML (manual updates)
│   │   └── press.yml          # Static YAML (manual updates)
│   ├── _pages/                # Site content
│   └── _posts/YYYY/           # Blog posts (organized by year)
└── scripts/
    ├── sync_config.py         # lab.yaml → _config.yml
    └── generate_videos.py     # YouTube API → videos.yml (weekly)
```

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install dependencies
bundle install --gemfile=site/Gemfile
uv pip install git+https://github.com/siddhss5/labdata.git

# Generate & serve
python scripts/sync_config.py
labdata --config lab.yaml --output site/_data/lab.yml
cd site && bundle exec jekyll serve

# Visit http://localhost:4000
```

## Editing Content

### Profile & Links
**Edit:** `lab.yaml` (name, description, email, social links)
**Sync:** `python scripts/sync_config.py` (or let CI/CD do it)

### Publications
**Edit:** Add/update BibTeX in `data/pubs/*.bib`
**Build:** Automatic (labdata generates HTML)

### People (Students/Postdocs/Alumni)
**Edit:** `data/people.yaml`
**Build:** Automatic (labdata generates site data)

### Projects
**Edit:** `data/projects.yaml`
**Build:** Automatic (labdata links publications)

### Blog Posts
**Create:** `site/_posts/YYYY/YYYY-MM-DD-title.md`
**Categories:** Use hyphens (`academic-advice`, not `Academic advice`)

### Videos
**Auto-updated:** Weekly via GitHub Actions
**Manual:** `python scripts/generate_videos.py`

## Deployment

Push to `main` or `minimal-mistakes` triggers:
1. `sync_config.py` - lab.yaml → _config.yml
2. `labdata generate` - Create site/_data/lab.yml
3. `jekyll build` - Generate static site
4. Deploy to GitHub Pages

## Clean Architecture Guarantees

✅ **One source** - Edit data once, use everywhere
✅ **Auto-generated** - No manual HTML/YAML updates
✅ **Type-safe** - labdata validates all data
✅ **No duplication** - DRY principle enforced
✅ **Automated** - CI/CD handles everything

## Tech Stack

- **Jekyll** - Static site generator
- **labdata** - Academic website data processor
- **Minimal Mistakes** - Jekyll theme
- **GitHub Actions** - CI/CD
- **YouTube Data API** - Video integration
